title: Sports and Health Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Related to the physical features of the Earth and how places are arranged
choices: geographic
imagination
prophet
rounds.answer: geographic
rounds.explanation: geographic: Related to the physical features of the Earth and how places are arranged

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A three-dimensional artwork made by shaping materials like stone, metal, or clay
choices: geographic
imagination
sculpture
rounds.answer: sculpture
rounds.explanation: sculpture: A three-dimensional artwork made by shaping materials like stone, metal, or clay

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Related to the natural world and the impact of human activity on it
choices: imagination
environmental
geographic
rounds.answer: environmental
rounds.explanation: environmental: Related to the natural world and the impact of human activity on it
